prompt.content:
We are trying to determine whether the AHT of our recruitment process depends on the recruiter managing the applicant. Hence, using the Get application tool on Greenhouse, based on the average time between applied_at and rejected_at for each application, calculate the average AHT in hours for each recruiter for applicants that were rejected on or before 12 June 2025.

Provide your answers directly in the console. Do not round intermediate calculations and round final answers to two decimal places.
